SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?song ?title WHERE {
  ?song p:P118 [ ps:P118 wd:Q5052000 ; pq:P1077 ?position ; pq:P585 ?date ] .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) = 2020)
  .
  FILTER(xsd:integer(?position) <= 100)
  .
  {
    ?song wdt:P175 ?a1 ; wdt:P175 ?a2 .
    FILTER(?a1 != ?a2)
  } UNION {
    ?song wdt:P1551 ?a1 ; wdt:P1551 ?a2 .
    FILTER(?a1 != ?a2)
  } UNION {
    ?song wdt:P175 ?a1 ; wdt:P1551 ?a2 .
    FILTER(?a1 != ?a2)
  }
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?song wdt:P175 wd:Q3155215
  }
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?song wdt:P1551 wd:Q3155215
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?song rdfs:label ?title .
    FILTER(lang(?title) = "en")
  }
}
```

Here's a revised SPARQL query:

SELECT DISTINCT ?song ?title
WHERE {
  # Billboard Hot 100 chart entries in 2020, top 100
  ?song p:P118 [
    ps:P118 wd:Q5052000;
    pq:P1077 ?position;
    pq:P585 ?date
  ].
  FILTER (YEAR(?date) = 2020).
  FILTER (xsd:integer(?position) <= 100).

  # Artists, excluding Doja Cat
  {
    ?song wdt:P175 ?artist.
    FILTER (?artist != wd:Q3155215)
  } UNION {
    ?song wdt:P1551 ?artist.
    FILTER (?artist != wd:Q3155215)
  }

  # Check for at least two distinct artists (main or featured)
  {
    ?song wdt:P175 ?a1.
    ?song wdt:P175 ?a2.
    FILTER (?a1 != ?a2)
    FILTER (?a1 != wd:Q3155215)
    FILTER (?a2 != wd:Q3155215)
  } UNION {
    ?song wdt:P1551 ?a1.
    ?song wdt:P1551 ?a2.
    FILTER (?a1 != ?a2)
    FILTER (?a1 != wd:Q3155215)
    FILTER (?a2 != wd:Q3155215)
  } UNION {
    ?song wdt:P175 ?a1.
    ?song wdt:P1551 ?a2.
    FILTER (?a1 != ?a2)
    FILTER (?a1 != wd:Q3155215)
    FILTER (?a2 != wd:Q3155215)
  }

  OPTIONAL {
    ?song rdfs:label ?title.
    FILTER (lang(?title) = "en")
  }
}

This should capture any song with at least two distinct artists, both not Doja Cat, where those artists are either both in P175, both in P1551, or one in each.

}

So the correct query should:

1. Find songs with chart position on Billboard Hot 100 (P118: wd:Q5052000) from 2020 (P585), position <=100 (P1077).

SELECT DISTINCT ?song ?title WHERE {
  ?song p:P118 [
    ps:P118 wd:Q5052000;  # Correct chart ID
    pq:P1077 ?position;
    pq:P585 ?date
  ].
  FILTER (YEAR(?date) = 2020).
  FILTER (xsd:integer(?position) <= 100).

  # At least two different artists (collaboration)
  {
    ?song wdt:P175 ?a1.
    ?song wdt:P175 ?a2.
    FILTER (?a1 != ?a2)
  } UNION
  {
    ?song wdt:P1551 ?a1.
    ?song wdt:P1551 ?a2.
    FILTER (?a1 != ?a2)
  } UNION
  {
    ?song wdt:P175 ?a1.
    ?song wdt:P1551 ?a2.
    FILTER (?a1 != ?a2)
  }

  # Exclude Doja Cat (Q3155215)
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?song wdt:P175 wd:Q3155215 }
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?song wdt:P1551 wd:Q3155215 }

  OPTIONAL {
    ?song rdfs:label ?title.
    FILTER (lang(?title) = "en")
  }
}
